---
title: "Tools & Applications"
---

A collection of open-source tools developed for forest inventory analysis,
data quality validation, and spatial decision-support. Each tool is available
as a distribution package — see individual repository links below.

---

## JavaScript Applications

### ForestUnit JS — Forest Unit Analysis Tool

![](images/screenshots/forest-unit.png)

**Description:**  
A fully client-side forest unit analysis tool that runs entirely in the browser.
No server or installation required. Designed for non-technical forest analysts
on Windows government workstations.

**Tech:** JavaScript (ES2020+), HTML, CSS  
**Live Demo:** [rinecology.github.io/forest-unit-js/](https://rinecology.github.io/forest-unit-js/)  
**Source:** Hosted in this portfolio repo under `/forest-unit-js/`

---

## R / Shiny Applications

### LOGIC_CHECKER — Forest Inventory Data Quality Reporting System

![](images/screenshots/logic-checker.png)

**Description:**  
Comprehensive validation and reporting system for Ontario forest inventory data
(FRI/PCI/BMI/OPI). Implements 156 production-ready validation rules with
spatial mapping integration. Supports CSV and Shapefile ZIP upload, severity-colored
centroid mapping, and both an interactive Shiny app and a PowerShell batch mode.

**Tech:** R, Shiny, Leaflet, PowerShell  
**Version:** 6.2 (March 2026)  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/logic-checker-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/logic-checker-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo

---

### FRI LiDAR Toolkit

![](images/screenshots/fri-lidar.png)

**Description:**  
R-based toolkit for processing and visualizing LiDAR-derived datasets from
Ontario's FRI Leaf-ON LiDAR program. Features batch CHM tile download from
Ontario GeoHub, virtual mosaic clipping (no ArcGIS), side-by-side FRI vs LiDAR
comparison, crown delineation, and 3D point cloud visualization via WebGL.

**Tech:** R, Shiny, terra, lidR, WebGL  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/fri-lidar-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/fri-lidar-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo

---

## R Pipeline Frameworks

### SLYM Companion — Stand Level Yield Curve Modeling Suite

![](images/screenshots/slym.png)

**Description:**  
An integrated suite of five specialized tools for forest inventory analysis and
yield curve modeling: SLYM Processor, NER Managed Template Generator, SLYM Runner,
SLYM Auto Runner, and SLYM Cutter. Automates data preparation, parameter estimation,
model execution, and result visualization.

**Tech:** R, Shiny, PowerShell  
**Source:** [github.com/rinecology/slym-companion-dist](https://github.com/rinecology/slym-companion-dist)  
**Download:** Available as a zip via GitHub Releases in the above repo
